description_long: This is a large, modern residential house surrounded by a white perimeter fence and set on a green lawn. The structure features a flat roof, multiple large rectangular windows, and a clean, geometric facade. The house appears to have two main stories with a possible rooftop terrace or partial third level, as indicated by the open sections on the roof. The exterior is predominantly white, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical groupings, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is centrally located and slightly recessed, accessible via a short set of steps and flanked by windows.
description: A large, modern white house with a flat roof, expansive windows, and a surrounding white fence on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front-left perspective showing the main entryway, central steps, and a clear view of the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the main entrance.
description_view_2: Rear-left perspective displaying the back facade, fewer windows, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_3: Rear-right perspective showing the back and side of the house, with visible garage doors and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows in horizontal and vertical groupings
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entry with steps, flanked by windows, minimal overhang, and no porch or columns
